pr_description:
This PR continues the work done by @quorak in #192, adapting the code to the latest version of material-ui/material-ui-chip-input (basically just the imports). This is mostly not my work, I just added some tests and clean the stories a bit, and apart from that it's the same as #192, but I thought it was a pity that #192 was not merged, since this is a good step forward for autosuggestions.

Just to be clear, this only adds support for suggestions using _react-autosuggest_, but it's not forcing the user to use this library. The idea is to create more examples of stories using other libraries like _downshift_ or _react-select_, improving the chip-input if needed to support those.

For now the goal of this PR is to support _react-autosuggest_, but I'll work on the other two if I have time, in coming pull requests.
(ref #214 #88)

pr_description:
Fixes #262 by adding an explicit `delayBeforeAdd` option in order to disable use of `setTimeout` by default. This could be a breaking change for those who are using event callbacks that conflict with `onBlur`. However, I assume that is the edge case and most implementations can use `onBlur` just fine.

@leMaik you OK with disabling the delay by default?
